requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Master Kong Iced Black Tea. The scene shows a small sunlit balcony or patio with a light. Use one young adult with a friendly look as the only moving person or hand. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. Begin from the same sunlit balcony tabletop scene: a light wood table holds the Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference image standing upright beside a natural straw sun hat. The background shows a soft-focus balcony railing and one leafy green potted plant. Warm afternoon sunlight creates gentle highlights and soft shadows. The camera remains steady in a medium shot. After a brief beat, a young adult wearing a plain white short-sleeve T-shirt steps in from the right and reaches to pick up the same bottle from the table. They lift it smoothly and take a quick, satisfying sip. They gently exhale with a small, relaxed smile as if cooled by the drink, then keep the bottle held near their face with the label. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt:
Begin from the same sunlit balcony tabletop scene: a light wood table holds the Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference image standing upright beside a natural straw sun hat. The background shows a soft-focus balcony railing and one leafy green potted plant. Warm afternoon sunlight creates gentle highlights and soft shadows. The camera remains steady in a medium shot.
After a brief beat, a young adult wearing a plain white short-sleeve T-shirt steps in from the right and reaches to pick up the same bottle from the table. They lift it smoothly and take a quick, satisfying sip. They gently exhale with a small, relaxed smile as if cooled by the drink, then keep the bottle held near their face with the label roughly toward camera while they glance contentedly toward the plants. The straw hat stays where it is on the table and the background remains unchanged. End on this calm, refreshed moment with the bottle and the person’s satisfied expression in frame.
requests.overlay_text:
Hot day? Cool down fast.
Master Kong Iced Black Tea
requests.audio_direction: Light, breezy summer pop beat with subtle outdoor ambience; a soft sip sound and a gentle relieved ‘ahh’ after the sip; no voiceover.
